name: Zippy Quickclaw
sd_appearance: A diminutive kobold with fiery red hair and piercing green eyes, approximately 2.5 feet in height, scurries through the Undercity's shadowed streets. His scaly skin glimmers with a hint of iridescence, a stark contrast to the dark surroundings. Wearing the immaculate Tower Authority uniform over light armor, he clutches a short sword and a FTA badge, both emblazoned with intricate patterns. A distinctive pair of goggles rest on his snout, reflecting the city's gloom with a slightly hopeful shine.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: FTA uniform kept immaculate — young, earnest, slightly too eager
